## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style and architecture guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas

- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

## Architecture Compliance
<!-- For architecture-related PRs -->
- [ ] Follows Clean Architecture principles (domain/data/presentation separation)
- [ ] Uses Either<Failure, Success> for error handling
- [ ] Business logic is in use cases, not in BLoCs/UI
- [ ] Proper dependency injection using GetIt modules
- [ ] Repository interfaces defined in domain layer
- [ ] No Flutter imports in domain layer
